untranslatable_reason: The Arms Index (TRIN) is not available in the allowed indicators list. This signal requires a dedicated TRIN/Arms Index indicator to function properly. The translation uses sma_5 as a placeholder, but this does not represent the actual Arms Index mean-reversion logic and should not be used for backtesting without access to TRIN data.
translation_notes: Signal references Arms Index (TRIN), a volume-based oscillator measuring advancing/declining volume ratios. This indicator is not in the allowed set. Entry conditions map to TRIN MA thresholds (1.2 for oversold/buy, 0.8 for overbought/sell), with exits on MA crossback through 1.0 or after 1-3 bars. Direction is context-dependent (mean reversion on extremes). Hold period set to 3 days maximum per exit condition.
